data.body: FIXED in 883cefcd. Added rebar._store.push.push_after_commit(tracker) and call it after the locked commit (lock released) in transition_compute (transition+reopen), claim_compute, compact_cli (gated: --skip-sync defers, so compact-on-close and compact-all batch their own push), compact_all_cli (one batch push), and delete_cli (main DELETE + re-invocation UNLINK-cleanup). Honors sync.push (off/async/always); best-effort (never fails the write). Reproduced before (claim/close/compact/delete left origin behind) and verified after (each leaves ahead=0). Tests: tests/interfaces/store/test_inline_write_push.py. Full offline 2113 + integration 20 green. Root cause was the tier-E bash->Python migration (e6e645ae/41217cc7/9f7bd246), NOT 0b32/7d1d.
